name: Milan City Park
description: Milan City Park is a place to play pickleball in Milan, TN. There are 6 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Milan Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Milan Family YMCA in Milan, TN! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: The Pickleball Warehouse
description: Come play pickleball at The Pickleball Warehouse in Milan, TN! There are 4 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and food. The courts are free. The courts can be reserved.
